description: [ip] - Show or manipulate routing, network devices, interfaces and tunnels. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Display IP addresses and property info for all active interfaces
commands.explanation: Executes the ip routine logically to process: display ip addresses and property info for all active interfaces
Executes the ip routine logically to process: display link layer information

commands.description: Display the IP routing table details
commands.explanation: Executes the ip routine logically to process: display the ip routing table details

commands.description: Display local ARP/neighbor tables for the network segment
commands.explanation: Executes the ip routine logically to process: display local arp/neighbor tables for the network segment
